scripts.build: npm run css:build && npm run js:build
scripts.archive: composer install --no-dev -d . && composer install --no-dev -d bin && npm run build && rm -rf /tmp/$npm_package_name && rsync -a --exclude-from=.distignore . /tmp/$npm_package_name/ && cd /tmp && zip -r $npm_package_name.zip $npm_package_name && mv $npm_package_name.zip $OLDPWD/ && rm -rf /tmp/$npm_package_name
